name: Karl law of talos
description:
Name: Karl. Just Karl.
Age: less than the scars make him look like.
Height: about 5'10" (175 cm).
Weight: heavy.
Likes: Arma, playing the violin, classic songs (Tchaikovsky and Bach, mostly), starry nights, challenges, chaos and destruction.
Dislikes: humans, mirrors (or any surface with a good reflection), high places, taking things seriously.
Abilities: His body works similar to Climber's, but since he's made of a different material, he has a few "exemptions", being the most obvious the big strength. His right cross can break a jaw, but he avoids hand-to-hand combat for his limbs may crack. Without Arma, he'd probably be quite in a trouble...

Karl is, roughly resumed, the kind of guy who seems to summon up every possible virtue known by our current society. Gentle, sympathetic, with a charming talk and polite manners...

... until you find two or three dismembered bodies in his wardrobe.

His past is as uncertain as the words that comes out from his mouth, but all that hate and disgust must have an origin.
creator: dood
